/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libur5_test__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libur5_test__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/ur5_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ur5_test/action/detail/move_gripper__description.c.o CMakeFiles/ur5_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ur5_test/action/detail/move_gripper__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/ur5_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ur5_test/action/detail/move_gripper__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
